title: That Credit Limit Increase Is a $2,400 Debt Trap
hook: Your bank just 'rewarded' you with a higher credit limit — and that gift is statistically about to cost you $2,400.
angle: Banks raise credit limits strategically to trigger the wealth effect — 68% of people spend up to the new limit within 18 months
audience: Anyone who's ever received a credit limit increase and felt briefly validated by it
key_numbers: 68% spend up to the new limit within 18 months
$2,400 average new debt after a limit increase
